name: Boundary AM-GM Sieve Lemma
proof: For every shell block B contained in S, prod_{i in B} x_i <= (sum_{i in B} x_i^2/w)^(w/2) <= (||x||_2^2/w)^(w/2). Summing over N_S contained blocks gives the sufficient bound.
remaining_faces: Only the high-support faces listed in boundary_amgm_uncertified_by_support.csv remain outside this simple sieve.
statement: For a support face S, if N_S <= A_w(1)(w/24)^(w/2), then the shell-domination inequality holds for all nonnegative x supported on S.
